articles.title: WHO Buries Lab Leak Evidence While Prepping Next Pandemic Power Grab
articles.summary: The World Health Organization continues its systematic denial of COVID-19's laboratory origins, dismissing mounting evidence to protect institutional credibility. This deliberate obfuscation serves to shield gain-of-function research networks while positioning WHO for expanded pandemic authority.

articles.title: FDA's Fatal Cover-Up: Child Deaths From COVID Vaccines Buried in Bureaucracy
articles.summary: Internal FDA documents reveal systematic suppression of pediatric deaths linked to COVID vaccines. Agency officials actively concealed safety signals while pushing experimental injections on children with near-zero COVID risk.

articles.title: Big Pharma's War on Turmeric: Why Nature's Anti-Inflammatory Can't Be Patented
articles.summary: The medical-pharmaceutical complex systematically suppresses turmeric's proven anti-inflammatory properties because curcuminoids cannot be patented for massive profits. Multiple disease pathways respond to this natural compound, threatening synthetic drug markets.

articles.title: Hemp Wars: How DuPont and Nixon Criminalized Medicine to Protect Corporate Profits
articles.summary: Hemp was systematically outlawed in 1937 not for health reasons but because DuPont saw natural fibers as competition to synthetics. Nixon's 1970 Controlled Substances Act falsely classified hemp as having 'no accepted medical use' despite overwhelming therapeutic evidence.

articles.title: Ozempic's Hidden Muscle Wasting Crisis Emerges as Weight Loss Hype Crumbles
articles.summary: New research reveals Ozempic's devastating impact on muscle health while mainstream media continues promoting the diabetes drug as a miracle weight loss solution. Patients lose critical muscle mass alongside fat, creating long-term metabolic damage.

articles.title: Farm Bill Trojan Horse: Industry Seeks to Override 1,000+ State Safety Laws
articles.summary: A buried rider in the Farm Bill would allow agricultural corporations to override over 1,000 state laws protecting public health and environmental safety. Industry-captured federal agencies seek to eliminate local oversight of toxic practices.

articles.title: Medical Minimalism Revolution: Why Less Treatment Often Means Better Outcomes
articles.summary: Evidence-based research increasingly shows that medical interventions frequently cause more harm than benefit, but profit-driven healthcare systems suppress 'less is more' approaches. Overdiagnosis and overtreatment epidemics serve financial interests over patient welfare.

articles.title: Gut-Brain Protein Circuit Discovery Challenges Decades of Nutritional Dogma
articles.summary: Scientists uncover hidden gut-brain network that drives protein cravings, potentially revolutionizing understanding of appetite and metabolism. This discovery contradicts mainstream dietary guidelines that have suppressed protein's central role in metabolic health.

articles.title: Big Pharma's War on Turmeric: Anti-Inflammatory Superfoods Suppressed Because They Can't Be Patented
articles.summary: The medical-pharmaceutical complex systematically suppresses turmeric and other anti-inflammatory superfoods despite their proven efficacy targeting multiple disease pathways. The reason is simple: curcuminoids can't be patented for massive profits, so natural alternatives are dismissed while synthetic drugs dominate treatment protocols.

articles.title: The Hemp Conspiracy: How DuPont and Big Pharma Destroyed Your Natural Medicine Cabinet in 1937
articles.summary: Hemp was systematically outlawed not for health concerns but because synthetic fiber corporations like DuPont saw it as competition. The 1970 Controlled Substances Act falsely classified hemp as Schedule I with 'no accepted medical use,' burying decades of therapeutic potential to protect corporate profits.

articles.title: Ozempic's Hidden Muscle Destruction: New Study Exposes What Pharma Won't Tell You
articles.summary: While Ozempic rakes in billions as a weight-loss miracle drug, new research reveals serious muscle health consequences that the pharmaceutical industry downplays. Semaglutide's effects on muscle mass and metabolism go far beyond the sanitized marketing narrative pushed by Novo Nordisk.

articles.summary: Wisconsin Senator Ron Johnson directly accuses the FDA of concealing COVID vaccine injuries in what he calls the largest government scandal of his lifetime. The agency that was supposed to protect public health instead buried evidence of vaccine risks to protect the narrative.

This institutional denial protects the very research establishment that may have created the pandemic in the first place.

articles.summary: The healthcare industry's business model depends on more procedures, more drugs, and more interventions - even when less treatment often produces better outcomes. This fundamental conflict between profit and patient wellbeing drives systematic overtreatment while suppressing evidence that simpler approaches work better.

articles.title: Neuroimaging's Replication Crisis: External Validation Reveals Widespread Study Failures
articles.summary: New research in Nature exposes the replication crisis plaguing neuroimaging studies, showing that external validation using independent datasets is essential but routinely ignored. This methodological failure has led to countless irreproducible findings that waste resources and mislead clinical practice.
